name: huggingface
description: Search models and datasets on the Hugging Face Hub and run chat completions via Inference Providers

envVars.name: HF_TOKEN
envVars.description: Hugging Face access token (starts with hf_)

tools.name: Search Models
tools.description: Search models on the Hugging Face Hub

author.description: Filter by author or organization, e.g. meta-llama

filter.description: Filter by tag, e.g. text-generation or pytorch

sort.description: Sort field: downloads, likes, createdAt, or trendingScore

historicalSummary.omitted: tags, timestamps, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: Get Model
tools.description: Get details about a model repository on the Hub

namespace.description: Model owner (user or organization), e.g. meta-llama

tools.name: Search Datasets
tools.description: Search datasets on the Hugging Face Hub

tools.name: Who Am I
tools.description: Get the account and permissions associated with the access token

tools.name: Create Chat Completion
tools.description: Generate a chat completion through the Hugging Face Inference Providers router (OpenAI-compatible)

model.description: Hub model ID, e.g. openai/gpt-oss-120b; append :cheapest or :fastest to pick a provider policy

messages.description: Chat messages, each with role (system|user|assistant) and content

prompts.title: Find trending models
prompts.prompt: Search the Hugging Face Hub for trending models for a task I describe and summarize the top results.

prompts.title: Chat with an open model
prompts.prompt: Use Hugging Face Inference Providers to generate a response from an open model I pick.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Hugging Face API Setup

steps.title: Create a Hugging Face account
steps.description: Go to https://huggingface.co and sign up or sign in. Hub API access and a generous Inference Providers free tier are available without billing.

steps.title: Create an access token
steps.description: Open https://huggingface.co/settings/tokens and create a fine-grained token. Enable 'Make calls to Inference Providers' if you want to use the chat completion tool; read access covers the Hub search tools.

steps.title: Store the token
steps.description: Copy the token and add it to your .env file as HF_TOKEN=hf_...

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Who Am I tool to confirm the token works and shows the expected permissions.

notes: Hub search endpoints work with read-scoped tokens; chat completions require the Inference Providers permission
Inference Providers usage beyond the free tier is billed at provider rates with no markup; PRO accounts include monthly credits
Some gated models (e.g. meta-llama) require accepting their license on the Hub before access
